description: Anthropic Messages streaming with the JSON response tool (variant). Validates that tool input streaming and the final tool-call are omitted when the tool is treated as a JSON response mode.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: JSON response tools may reuse tool_use blocks internally; the v3 surface should still represent them as text.
